title: On the (847,423,211) Difference-Set Problem in C_11 x C_77
lean_gate_reason: Lean would only formalize a still-subtitle-level necessary-condition slice. The shortest remaining path is either a same-lane compatibility closure for the exact row or cooling the candidate; formalization does not by itself make this packet paper-ready.
micro_paper_assessment: Lane-eligible at the target level only. The achieved result is a structural necessary-condition slice, not yet a paper-shaped one-shot theorem packet, and it should be continued only if the same exact row admits a short compatibility closure.
family_affinity: abelian Paley/skew-Hadamard parameter row in the noncyclic group C_11^2 x C_7, now narrowed to small-quotient rigidity and an AG(2,11) compatibility problem
generalization_signal: the inert-prime parity step and small-prime quotient-profile reductions look reusable, but the final compatibility closure is still instance-specific
strongest_honest_claim: The current packet gives a nontrivial necessary-condition reduction for the exact open row: any putative (847,423,211) difference set in C_11 x C_77 would have odd C_7-fiber counts over C_11^2, hence only fiber sizes 1,3,5,7, and would have extremely rigid small-quotient shadows. This is theorem-shaped progress, but it does not yet determine existence or nonexistence for the row itself.
paper_title_hint: Necessary Conditions for a (847,423,211) Difference Set in C_11 x C_77
candidate_theorem_slice: A necessary-condition slice for the exact row: odd C_7-fiber parity over C_11^2, the induced odd-fiber census, three surviving order-7 quotient classes, and a sharply rigid order-11 quotient profile package for any putative (847,423,211) difference set in C_11 x C_77.
next_action: Either close the remaining global compatibility obstruction within the same exact row, or cool and move this candidate aside. Do not broaden into a larger theorem program, and do not spend the next cycle on Lean-first formalization.
